ItacPersonItem.Notes: On Mora, Gianluigi Betti, Scrittori politici bolognesi (Genua, 2000); Paul Gehl `Military courtesy in Sixteenth-Century Lithuania: Il cavaliere of Domenico Mora` Archivum Lithuanicum 3 (2001) pp. 55-76
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
